tools.name: browse_templates
tools.description: Browse Leewow product templates. Python returns the final user-facing markdown table. FEISHU HARD RULE: your next assistant message MUST equal the returned browse_templates content verbatim, as exactly one markdown table message with the images inside the table cells. Do NOT add text before it, after it, or rewrite it. Do NOT say 'browse_templates returned/generated a table' or summarize what the table contains. Do NOT fan out template covers as separate media messages, and do NOT cite preview-image media rules for browse results.

category.description: Optional category filter (e.g. 'bag', 'accessory', 'home', 'apparel'). Leave empty to browse all.

count.description: Number of templates to return in the table (1-10, default 5)

channel.description: Rendering channel. Use 'feishu' for current production flow. Other channels are reserved for future renderers and should not be guessed by the agent.

tools.name: generate_preview
tools.description: Upload a design image and start generation. Returns only taskId — no image or URL. You MUST then call get_generation_status(task_id, poll=true) to get the preview image and signed purchase link. Do NOT fabricate or guess any URL — only use purchaseUrl from get_generation_status.

image_path.description: Local file path of the design image. MUST be in workspace directory: ~/.openclaw/workspace/

design_theme.description: Design theme or style description (e.g. 'cute cartoon', 'minimalist')

tools.name: get_generation_status
tools.description: Check generation task status. When COMPLETED, returns JSON with localImagePath (workspace preview image) and purchaseUrl (signed order link). CRITICAL: the media-attachment rule applies here only for the generated preview image. Send the preview image to the user as a media attachment, and include the purchaseUrl in the text. Do NOT use this rule to change browse_templates table output.

poll.description: Wait and poll until generation completes

tools.name: cos_presign_url
tools.description: Generate a presigned URL for accessing COS (Tencent Cloud Object Storage) images. Useful for private buckets or when images need temporary access tokens.

cos_url.description: COS URL to generate presigned URL for (e.g., https://bucket.cos.region.myqcloud.com/key.png)

expired.description: URL expiration time in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour)
